name: §2.27 context_summary length cap of 500 chars is enforced at write time per the contract
command: BIG=$(printf 'a%.0s' $(seq 1 501)) && H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id s --parent-session-id p --parent-cl-id c --current-phase F --context-summary "$BIG" --next-action go --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q '500 char' err.txt && echo enforced 1>&2
